summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Landing Page reorganization and About page route. All 9 features verified successfully - sections correctly ordered as Hero → See It In Action → Legislation → Caselaw Search → Pricing → You Have Options (at bottom). About page route works, footer/button navigation to /about confirmed.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with Hero section visible at top
See It In Action section appears after Hero (Y=978px) with feature cards (Upload Documents, Build Timelines, etc.)
Legislation section (Criminal Law by State) appears after See It In Action (Y=6032px)
Caselaw Search section (Search Real Court Decisions) appears after Legislation (Y=7222px)
Pricing section (Simple, Affordable Access) appears after Caselaw Search (Y=7925px)
You Have Options section (Legal Help You May Not Know About) is at bottom of page (Y=8776px)
/about route loads AboutPage component with correct content (Our Story, Why I Built This, Debra King)
Footer About link (/about) navigates correctly to About page
Read My Full Story button links to /about and navigates correctly
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx correctly structured with 6 sections in required order
App.js has /about route properly configured with AboutPage component
AboutPage.jsx is a complete standalone page with header, content, footer, and Back navigation
Footer has working About link at line 1414
Read My Full Story button correctly implemented at lines 1376-1379
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page section order verified: 1.Hero(289px) → 2.SeeItInAction(978px) → 3.Legislation(6032px) → 4.CaselawSearch(7222px) → 5.Pricing(7925px) → 6.YouHaveOptions(8776px). About page route /about works with full navigation from footer link and Read My Full Story button.
